intro: Galarhoeus irgisensis, also known as Mongolian ginseng, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Araliaceae family. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine to promote vitality, reduce stress, and boost the immune system, with health benefits attributed to its ability to improve cardiovascular health, reduce inflammation, and enhance cognitive function. The bioactive constituents of Galarhoeus irgisensis include saponins, flavonoids, and polyphenolic compounds, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
